expectations.text: explains-static-scanning: Explains that Tailwind only includes classes it can find as literal/static strings in scanned files (concatenated/dynamic class names get purged)
suggests-mapping-to-literal-classes: Suggests mapping dynamic values to literal class names server-side (PHP array → known class strings)
mentions-safelist: Mentions safelist (comment in scanned file or config) as a way to keep classes
mentions-arbitrary-values: Mentions arbitrary values like `bg-[#ff0000]` as an alternative
mentions-rebuild: Tells the user to rebuild Tailwind (`npm run build` or `npm run watch`) after changes
diagnoses-the-bug: Identifies the root cause (the dynamic class isn't visible to Tailwind's scanner) before suggesting fixes
